title: hydrocotyle moschata
intro: Hydrocotyle moschata, also known as musk plant, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Southeast Asia and Australia. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle moschata include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
